2026-04-10T03:05:45.4658253Z 
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4658624Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4662740Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4667169Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4667820Z 
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4668258Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4673024Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4673613Z 
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4673894Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4674303Z 
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4675539Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4714467Z 
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4715034Z   git switch -
2026-04-10T03:05:45.4715313Z
